headline: The Nasdaq 100 Has Tripled Since 2020, But These 10 Mega-Caps Are Still Underwater
summary: The Nasdaq 100 has tripled since 2020, but 10 mega-caps still trade below pre-Covid levels. Who's still underwater and why?

raw.headline: The Nasdaq 100 Has Tripled Since 2020, But These 10 Mega-Caps Are Still Underwater
raw.summary: The Nasdaq 100 has tripled since 2020, but 10 mega-caps still trade below pre-Covid levels. Who's still underwater and why?

headline: Assaf Henkin, Jedify CEO: A Fortt Knox Conversation
summary: Jedify co-founder and CEO Assaf Henkin tells Jon Fortt enterprise AI agents fail because models are commoditizing but business context isn't — and his $24M Series A from Norwest, with strategic investment from Snowflake Ventures, funds a "context graph" layer built to fix that. The Israeli serial founder, whose Kontera was acquired by Singtel and folded into Amobee, calls it Semantic Fusion: a layer that fuses live enterprise data so agents stop guessing.
